creator: salvadore@freebsd.org
text:
Created attachment 199724
upnp adoption patch, without PORTREVISION bump

I would like to take MAINTAINER'ship for this port.

- Sets MAINTAINER to my e-mail address.
- Reorders USES and USE_LDCONFIG lines consistently with the standard ordering.
- Transforms OPT_CONFIGURE_ON/OFF into OPT_CONFIGURE_ENABLE or OPT_CONFIGURE_WITH.

I tested successfully with portlint and poudriere (11.2-RELEASE-p5 i386/amd64).
